name: feature.analytics.nodes
description: Analytics feature node pack (ADR 0014) — read nodes over the ctx.features.analytics surface. query reads a metric summary / recent events into a run (e.g. gate a branch on conversion volume). track + conversion-forward are Phase 2/3.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Analytics: Query
nodes.description: Reads an org's analytics summary (counts, sessions, top paths, UTM sources) over ctx.features.analytics. Tenant-guarded.
